emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the The g Hotel website and wanted to share some honest observations. No pitch.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 74/100
========================================

Platform: WordPress

Issues found: 6

HIGH PRIORITY
--------------------
- 1 HTTP resources (mixed content)
  Assets loading over HTTP on an HTTPS page trigger browser security warnings.

MEDIUM PRIORITY
--------------------
- No H1 heading
  H1 headings tell Google the main topic of your page.

MEDIUM PRIORITY
--------------------
- No analytics tracking
  Without analytics, you cannot see how visitors find you or what they do on your site.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- 9 external CSS files
  Each CSS file is a separate HTTP request.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- 25 external scripts
  Consider consolidating or deferring non-critical scripts.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- Placeholder/low-quality images detected
  Some images appear to be placeholders (very small dimensions).

WHAT IS WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Page title is set
+ Meta description present
+ 36 images on the page
+ Good page size (71.8KB)
+ Clean sans-serif body font
+ Uses modern CSS layout (Flexbox/Grid)
+ Viewport meta tag present (mobile-friendly setup)
+ Uses modern rounded corners / cards
+ Uses shadows for visual depth
+ Contact form/page found on: /contact-us
+ SSL certificate valid ÔÇö 76 days remaining
+ HSTS (HTTP Strict Transport Security) is set
+ Content Security Policy (CSP) is configured
+ X-Frame-Options prevents clickjacking
+ X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff is set
+ Built with WordPress
+ Contact form found on: /contact-us, /about-us
+ Built with WordPress
+ Built with WordPress

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.
If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios
Websites for small businesses in Ireland.

issues.detail: H1 headings tell Google the main topic of your page.
issues.label: No H1 heading
issues.check: View page source (Ctrl+U). Search for an H1 tag. If there is none, the page structure is weak.
issues.siteHint: Missing H1 weakens your search ranking signals.

issues.detail: Assets loading over HTTP on an HTTPS page trigger browser security warnings.
issues.label: 1 HTTP resources (mixed content)
issues.check: Click the lock icon in the address bar. If it says 'Not Secure' or shows a warning, mixed content is present.
issues.siteHint: Visitors may get browser warnings and leave your site.

issues.detail: Each CSS file is a separate HTTP request.
issues.label: 9 external CSS files
issues.check: Open DevTools Network tab, reload. Count CSS files.
issues.siteHint: Extra HTTP requests slow down page load.

issues.detail: Consider consolidating or deferring non-critical scripts.
issues.label: 25 external scripts
issues.check: Same check - DevTools Network tab, filter by JS.

issues.detail: Without analytics, you cannot see how visitors find you or what they do on your site.
issues.label: No analytics tracking
issues.check: Check the page source for references to gtag, analytics.js, or fbq.
issues.siteHint: You are flying blind - no data on what pages work or where traffic comes from.

issues.detail: Some images appear to be placeholders (very small dimensions).
issues.label: Placeholder/low-quality images detected
issues.check: Do any images look like grey boxes or low-res blurs where real images should be?
issues.siteHint: Replace placeholder images with actual photography or graphics.
